columns.name: SESONG
columns.description: The season number or code

columns.name: ANLEGGSNR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the installation

columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: Identifier for the batch or lot of goods

columns.name: PARTI_LNR
columns.description: The line number within a batch or lot of goods

columns.name: VAREART
columns.description: Type of product being analyzed

columns.name: LAGERKVALITET
columns.description: The quality level of storage

columns.name: HLVEKT
columns.description: Weight measurement for high-quality goods

columns.name: VANNPROSENT
columns.description: Percentage of water content in the goods

columns.name: FALLTALL
columns.description: Number of defects found in the goods

columns.name: PROTEIN_PROS
columns.description: Percentage of protein content in the goods

columns.name: KVF1_NR
columns.description: First quality factor number or code

columns.name: KVF2_NR
columns.description: Second quality factor number or code

columns.name: KVF3_NR
columns.description: Third quality factor number or code

columns.name: STJERNE
columns.description: Rating given to the goods, typically on a star scale

columns.name: ANALYSEDATO
columns.description: The date when the analysis was conducted

columns.name: LABNR
columns.description: Identifier for the laboratory conducting the analysis

columns.name: FILREF
columns.description: Reference number for the file or record

columns.name: AVRENSPROSENT
columns.description: Percentage of degradation in the goods

columns.name: AVVIK
columns.description: Any deviation from standard or expected values

columns.name: BEHANDLET
columns.description: Indicates whether the goods have been processed or not

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the user who performed the analysis

columns.name: BEH_TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp when behavior or process occurred

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The exact time and date of the analysis

columns.name: TUSENKORNVEKT
columns.description: Weight of sunken kernels in total

columns.name: DON_ANALYSE
columns.description: Amount donated for the analysis process
